name: feature-workflows
description: Gate-enforced feature pipeline: THINK (design) -> DO (implement) -> FIX (tune) -> EXTRACT (reverse-engineer design docs from existing code) -> REVIEW (audit an existing design docset and collect issues) + read-only status. Ships the feature-pipeline dynamic-workflow engine (auto-linked into ~/.claude/workflows/ by the pipeline commands; /feature-workflows:setup is the doctor/repair command), 31 specialized sub-agents, and the compress-md skill.
